mapper.select: select user_coupon_id, user_id, coupon_id, claim_time, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time from user_coupon where user_id = #{userId} order by claim_time desc
select user_coupon_id, user_id, coupon_id, claim_time, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time from user_coupon where user_id = #{userId} and coupon_id = #{couponId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, claim_time, expire_time, status) values (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{claimTime}, #{expireTime}, #{status})
